title: M9 fresh npm beta install and clean-profile OpenClaw load
user_task: As a beta user or OpenClaw agent, prove npm beta install from the registry into an isolated prefix and clean OpenClaw profile load without relying on a linked repo checkout.
expected_public_safe_evidence: registry beta version and dist-tag summary
isolated npm prefix path redacted or evidence-root-relative
loo and loo-mcp-server binary paths or existence booleans
blocker codes only for any first-run setup requirement
proof_boundary: Dry-run install/load scenario contract for npm beta and a clean OpenClaw profile. It may prove beta installability and first-run setup classification, but does not prove stable release, npm latest promotion, live Codex control, generic GUI mutation, or release-grade customer readiness.
next_action: Run isolated-prefix npm beta install, dogfood the clean OpenClaw profile, run tool-smoke, published-smoke, and onboard status, then record only public-safe summaries and blocker codes.
